description_te: ఇంటికి దూరంగా చదివే విద్యార్థులకు hostel/mess/travel ఖర్చుల కోసం ₹10,000 నుండి ₹20,000 వరకు ఆర్థిక సహాయం.
description_en: Financial assistance of ₹10,000 to ₹20,000 for hostel, mess, and travel expenses for students studying away from home.

eligibility_criteria.courses: ITI, Polytechnic, Degree, Engineering, Medicine, PG courses
eligibility_criteria.distance: Must be studying away from home (different mandal/district)

benefit_amount: ₹10,000 (Day scholars in different mandal) / ₹15,000 (Hostellers) / ₹20,000 (Professional courses hostellers)
application_process_te:
1. Vasathi Deevena portal లో online apply
2. College లో hostel/accommodation proof submit
3. College verification
4. DBT ద్వారా mother's bank account కి credit
